records.question: Which universities named Imperial College London are located in the United Kingdom?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
WHERE university.university_name = 'Imperial College London' AND country.country_name = 'United Kingdom'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT u.id
FROM university u
INNER JOIN country c ON u.country_id = c.id
WHERE u.university_name = 'Imperial College London'
AND c.country_name = 'United Kingdom'

records.question: Which universities named University of New Orleans are located in the United States of America?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
WHERE country.country_name = 'United States of America' AND university.university_name = 'University of New Orleans'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.id
FROM university u
INNER JOIN country c ON u.country_id = c.id
WHERE u.university_name = 'University of New Orleans'
AND c.country_name = 'United States of America'

records.question: Which university is named exactly Trinity College Dublin and has related country, ranking, and year information?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university.university_name = 'Trinity College Dublin'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.id
FROM university u
INNER JOIN country c ON u.country_id = c.id
INNER JOIN university_ranking_year ury ON u.id = ury.university_id
INNER JOIN university_year uy ON u.id = uy.university_id
WHERE u.university_name = 'Trinity College Dublin'

records.question: Which universities named University of Victoria had exactly a 21.5 student-staff ratio, no more than 56.0% female students, no more than 11% international students, and at least 17581 students in years no later than 2012, with rankings from 2013 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university_year.student_staff_ratio = 21.5 AND university_year.pct_female_students <= 56.0 AND university_year.pct_international_students <= 11 AND university_ranking_year.year <= 2013 AND university_year.year <= 2012 AND university_year.num_students >= 17581 AND university.university_name = 'University of Victoria'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.id
FROM university u
WHERE u.university_name = 'University of Victoria'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM university_ranking_year ury
    WHERE ury.university_id = u.id
    AND ury.year <= 2013
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM university_year uy
    WHERE uy.university_id = u.id
    AND uy.student_staff_ratio = 21.5
    AND uy.pct_female_students <= 56.0
    AND uy.pct_international_students <= 11
    AND uy.year <= 2012
    AND uy.num_students >= 17581
)

records.question: Which universities named Wake Forest University are located in the United States of America and have rankings from 2011 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
WHERE university_ranking_year.year <= 2011 AND country.country_name = 'United States of America' AND university.university_name = 'Wake Forest University'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.id
FROM university u
JOIN country c ON u.country_id = c.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ury ON u.id = ury.university_id
WHERE u.university_name = 'Wake Forest University'
AND c.country_name = 'United States of America'
AND ury.year <= 2011

records.question: Which universities in the United States of America had a ranking score of at most 22.0 in 2015, with at least 26% international students and no more than 44% female students?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university_ranking_year.score <= 22.0 AND university_year.pct_international_students >= 26 AND country.country_name = 'United States of America' AND university_year.year = 2015 AND university_year.pct_female_students <= 44.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.id
FROM university u
INNER JOIN country c ON u.country_id = c.id
INNER JOIN university_ranking_year ury ON u.id = ury.university_id
INNER JOIN university_year uy ON u.id = uy.university_id
WHERE c.country_name = 'United States of America'
  AND ury.score <= 22.0
  AND uy.year = 2015
  AND uy.pct_international_students >= 26
  AND uy.pct_female_students <= 44.0

records.question: Which universities named University of Pittsburgh in the United States have at least 26485 students, exactly 10% international students, at least 51% female students, and a ranking score of at most 32.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ON university.id = university_ranking_year.university_id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university.university_name = 'University of Pittsburgh' AND university_year.num_students >= 26485 AND university_year.pct_international_students = 10 AND country.country_name = 'United States of America' AND university_ranking_year.score <= 32.0 AND university_year.pct_female_students >= 51.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.id
FROM university u
JOIN country c ON u.country_id = c.id
JOIN university_ranking_year ury ON u.id = ury.university_id
JOIN university_year uy ON u.id = uy.university_id
WHERE u.university_name = 'University of Pittsburgh'
  AND c.country_name = 'United States of America'
  AND ury.score <= 32.0
  AND uy.num_students >= 26485
  AND uy.pct_international_students = 10
  AND uy.pct_female_students >= 51.0

records.question: Which universities in the United States of America have a student staff ratio exactly equal to 13.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT university.id FROM university
JOIN country ON university.country_id = country.id
JOIN university_year ON university.id = university_year.university_id
WHERE university_year.student_staff_ratio = 13.0 AND country.country_name = 'United States of America'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.id
FROM university u
INNER JOIN country c ON u.country_id = c.id
INNER JOIN university_year uy ON u.id = uy.university_id
WHERE c.country_name = 'United States of America'
AND uy.student_staff_ratio = 13.0
